title: HOME AND PERSONAL PROPERTY LOANS - 211info
text: UNITED STATES SMALL BUSINESS ADMINISTRATION HOME AND PERSONAL PROPERTY LOANS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Loans to cover repairs and replacement of physical assets damaged in a declared disaster. Homeowners may apply for up to $500,000 to replace or repair their primary residence. Renters and homeowners may borrow up to $100,000 to replace or repair personal property — such as clothing, furniture, cars, and appliances — damaged or destroyed in a disaster. Eligibility: Must be located in federally declared disaster area. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (800) 659-2955 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (800) 827-5722 Main phone Hotline (800) 659-2955 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: USA Services: Disaster Loans Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - BUSINESS PHYSICAL DISASTER LOANS DISASTER SERVICES - ECONOMIC INJURY DISASTER LOAN PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
